scripts.dev: concurrently -n host,catalog,orders -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @sportshop/mfe-host" "npm run dev -w @sportshop/mfe-catalog" "npm run dev -w @sportshop/mfe-orders"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sportshop/mfe-host && npm run build -w @sportshop/mfe-catalog && npm run build -w @sportshop/mfe-orders
